subcodes.first_line: This manifest Book hath been sent down from the presence of God, the All-Protecting, the Self-Subsisting, unto him who hath been illumined by the light of the Countenance when He came [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب معلوم نزل من لدی الله المهیمن القیوم للذی اضاء من انوار الوجه اذ اتی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @wisdom [hikmat]
